example_sentence_en: A comprehensive review of all subjects is necessary before the exam.
example_sentence_cn: 考试前对所有科目进行全面复习是必要的。
inflection: 比较级: more comprehensive | 最高级: most comprehensive

example_sentence_en: We need to consolidate our knowledge before the final exam.
example_sentence_cn: 我们需要在期末考试前巩固我们的知识。
inflection: 动词变化: consolidates / consolidated / consolidating

example_sentence_en: Time management is crucial during the revision period.
example_sentence_cn: 在复习阶段，时间管理至关重要。
inflection: 比较级: more crucial | 最高级: most crucial

example_sentence_en: Please elaborate on your answer with specific examples.
example_sentence_cn: 请用具体例子详细阐述你的回答。
inflection: 动词变化: elaborates / elaborated / elaborating

example_sentence_en: The test was difficult; nevertheless, she scored very well.
example_sentence_cn: 考试很难，尽管如此，她的成绩还是很好。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: He is outgoing, whereas his sister is very quiet.
example_sentence_cn: 他性格外向，然而他的姐姐非常安静。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: The plan is practical; furthermore, it is cost-effective.
example_sentence_cn: 这个计划是实际可行的；此外，它还具有成本效益。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: He didn't study hard; consequently, he failed the exam.
example_sentence_cn: 他没有努力学习；因此，他没有通过考试。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: She was told the rules and behaved accordingly.
example_sentence_cn: 她被告知了规则，并据此行事。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Notwithstanding the difficulties, he completed the project.
example_sentence_cn: 尽管困难重重，他还是完成了这个项目。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: It was raining; nonetheless, we decided to go hiking.
example_sentence_cn: 虽然在下雨，我们仍然决定去远足。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: She can speak English and Chinese simultaneously.
example_sentence_cn: 她可以同时讲英语和中文。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: He practiced every day, thereby improving his performance.
example_sentence_cn: 他每天练习，从而提高了他的表现。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: We need a system whereby all students can access quality education.
example_sentence_cn: 我们需要一个让所有学生都能获得优质教育的系统。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: The school is predominantly composed of students from rural areas.
example_sentence_cn: 这所学校主要由来自农村地区的学生组成。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Teamwork and creativity constitute the foundation of success.
example_sentence_cn: 团队合作和创造力构成了成功的基础。
inflection: 动词变化: constitutes / constituted / constituting

example_sentence_en: It is difficult to sustain concentration for hours of studying.
example_sentence_cn: 连续几小时学习很难保持专注。
inflection: 动词变化: sustains / sustained / sustaining

example_sentence_en: Poor sleep can undermine your academic performance.
example_sentence_cn: 睡眠不足会削弱你的学业表现。
inflection: 动词变化: undermines / undermined / undermining

example_sentence_en: Practice exercises reinforce the grammar rules you have learned.
example_sentence_cn: 练习题巩固了你所学的语法规则。
inflection: 动词变化: reinforces / reinforced / reinforcing

example_sentence_en: You must acknowledge your mistakes to improve.
example_sentence_cn: 你必须承认自己的错误才能进步。
inflection: 动词变化: acknowledges / acknowledged / acknowledging

example_sentence_en: Technology facilitates communication between people worldwide.
example_sentence_cn: 技术促进了世界各地人们之间的沟通。
inflection: 动词变化: facilitates / facilitated / facilitating

example_sentence_en: Good students accumulate knowledge over time.
example_sentence_cn: 好学生随着时间的推移积累知识。
inflection: 动词变化: accumulates / accumulated / accumulating

example_sentence_en: Allocate enough time to each subject when reviewing.
example_sentence_cn: 复习时要给每门学科分配足够的时间。
inflection: 动词变化: allocates / allocated / allocating

example_sentence_en: A well-planned strategy is useless if you cannot execute it.
example_sentence_cn: 如果你不能执行，一个计划周密的策略也是无用的。
inflection: 动词变化: executes / executed / executing

example_sentence_en: She derives great satisfaction from helping others.
example_sentence_cn: 她从帮助他人中获得了极大的满足感。
inflection: 动词变化: derives / derived / deriving

example_sentence_en: The implications of this decision will be felt for years.
example_sentence_cn: 这个决定的影响将持续多年。
inflection: 复数: implications

example_sentence_en: Stress among high school students is increasingly prevalent.
example_sentence_cn: 高中生中的压力越来越普遍。
inflection: 比较级: more prevalent | 最高级: most prevalent

example_sentence_en: Making mistakes is inevitable when learning a new language.
example_sentence_cn: 学习新语言时犯错是不可避免的。
inflection: 比较级: more inevitable | 最高级: most inevitable

example_sentence_en: Is it feasible to complete this project in one week?
example_sentence_cn: 一周内完成这个项目可行吗？
inflection: 比较级: more feasible | 最高级: most feasible

example_sentence_en: There are inherent risks in any investment.
example_sentence_cn: 任何投资都存在固有的风险。
inflection: 比较级: more inherent | 最高级: most inherent

example_sentence_en: A coherent argument is essential for a good essay.
example_sentence_cn: 连贯的论证对于一篇好文章至关重要。
inflection: 比较级: more coherent | 最高级: most coherent

example_sentence_en: The question was ambiguous, making it hard to answer.
example_sentence_cn: 这道题模棱两可，很难回答。
inflection: 比较级: more ambiguous | 最高级: most ambiguous

example_sentence_en: Try to look at the issue from different perspectives.
example_sentence_cn: 试着从不同的视角来看这个问题。
inflection: 复数: perspectives

example_sentence_en: The Chinese minister met with his British counterpart.
example_sentence_cn: 中国部长会见了他的英国对等官员。
inflection: 复数: counterparts

example_sentence_en: The internet has created a new paradigm for communication.
example_sentence_cn: 互联网创造了一种新的沟通范式。
inflection: 复数: paradigms

example_sentence_en: There is a strong correlation between exercise and health.
example_sentence_cn: 运动和健康之间有很强的相关性。
inflection: 复数: correlations

example_sentence_en: This crime falls under the jurisdiction of federal courts.
example_sentence_cn: 这项犯罪属于联邦法院的管辖范围。
inflection: 复数: jurisdictions

example_sentence_en: Investment in infrastructure boosts economic growth.
example_sentence_cn: 基础设施投资促进了经济增长。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Financial incentives encourage people to save energy.
example_sentence_cn: 经济激励措施鼓励人们节约能源。
inflection: 复数: incentives

example_sentence_en: Students with autonomy tend to learn more effectively.
example_sentence_cn: 有自主权的学生往往学得更有效。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Once you build momentum in studying, it becomes easier.
example_sentence_cn: 一旦你在学习中建立起势头，就会变得更容易。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Time constraints make thorough revision challenging.
example_sentence_cn: 时间限制使得彻底复习颇具挑战性。
inflection: 复数: constraints

example_sentence_en: The main criterion for marking is accuracy.
example_sentence_cn: 评分的主要标准是准确性。
inflection: 复数: criteria

example_sentence_en: You should take the initiative to seek feedback on your work.
example_sentence_cn: 你应该主动寻求对自己工作的反馈。
inflection: 复数: initiatives

example_sentence_en: Coherence in writing makes ideas easier to follow.
example_sentence_cn: 写作中的连贯性使想法更容易理解。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: From the context, you can deduce the meaning of the word.
example_sentence_cn: 从上下文你可以推断出这个词的意思。
inflection: 动词变化: deduces / deduced / deducing

example_sentence_en: She used evidence to refute the opposing argument.
example_sentence_cn: 她用证据反驳了对方的论点。
inflection: 动词变化: refutes / refuted / refuting

example_sentence_en: He asserted that the policy would cause more harm than good.
example_sentence_cn: 他断言这项政策弊大于利。
inflection: 动词变化: asserts / asserted / asserting

example_sentence_en: There is an implicit warning in the author's words.
example_sentence_cn: 作者话语中有隐含的警告。
inflection: 比较级: more implicit | 最高级: most implicit

example_sentence_en: The examiner expects explicit and detailed answers.
example_sentence_cn: 考官期望明确而详细的答案。
inflection: 比较级: more explicit | 最高级: most explicit

example_sentence_en: She had a legitimate reason for missing the test.
example_sentence_cn: 她有缺席考试的正当理由。
inflection: 比较级: more legitimate | 最高级: most legitimate

example_sentence_en: Electric vehicles are a viable alternative to petrol cars.
example_sentence_cn: 电动汽车是汽油车的可行替代品。
inflection: 比较级: more viable | 最高级: most viable

example_sentence_en: Don't give a superficial answer; go into depth.
example_sentence_cn: 不要给出肤浅的回答，要深入分析。
inflection: 比较级: more superficial | 最高级: most superficial

example_sentence_en: Intrinsic motivation drives long-term success.
example_sentence_cn: 内在动机推动长期成功。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Rewards are a form of extrinsic motivation.
example_sentence_cn: 奖励是外在动机的一种形式。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Abstract thinking allows us to solve complex problems.
example_sentence_cn: 抽象思维让我们能够解决复杂的问题。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: The scientist tested her hypothesis through experiments.
example_sentence_cn: 科学家通过实验检验了她的假设。
inflection: 复数: hypotheses

example_sentence_en: The research methodology must be clearly explained.
example_sentence_cn: 研究方法必须清楚地加以说明。
inflection: 复数: methodologies

example_sentence_en: Please explain the rationale behind your decision.
example_sentence_cn: 请解释你决定背后的基本原理。
inflection: 复数: rationales

example_sentence_en: There is a contradiction between what he says and does.
example_sentence_cn: 他说的和做的之间存在矛盾。
inflection: 复数: contradictions

example_sentence_en: Everyone should be aware of their own cognitive bias.
example_sentence_cn: 每个人都应该意识到自己的认知偏见。
inflection: 复数: biases

example_sentence_en: Consistency in studying leads to better exam results.
example_sentence_cn: 坚持不懈地学习会带来更好的考试成绩。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Write a clear abstract before submitting your paper.
example_sentence_cn: 提交论文前要写一个清楚的摘要。
inflection: 复数: abstracts

example_sentence_en: Every citation in the essay should be properly referenced.
example_sentence_cn: 文章中的每条引文都应正确注明出处。
inflection: 复数: citations

example_sentence_en: The essay requires a synthesis of multiple ideas.
example_sentence_cn: 这篇文章需要对多个观点进行综合。
inflection: 复数: syntheses

example_sentence_en: Making correct inferences is a key reading skill.
example_sentence_cn: 做出正确的推断是一项关键的阅读技能。
inflection: 复数: inferences

example_sentence_en: It may seem counterintuitive, but rest improves productivity.
example_sentence_cn: 这可能看起来违反直觉，但休息可以提高效率。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: Don't oversimplify complex issues in your essay.
example_sentence_cn: 不要在文章中对复杂问题过度简化。
inflection: 动词变化: oversimplifies / oversimplified / oversimplifying

example_sentence_en: Can you distinguish between affect and effect?
example_sentence_cn: 你能区分affect和effect的用法吗？
inflection: 动词变化: distinguishes / distinguished / distinguishing

example_sentence_en: Use examples to illustrate your main points.
example_sentence_cn: 用例子来说明你的主要观点。
inflection: 动词变化: illustrates / illustrated / illustrating

example_sentence_en: Can you clarify what you mean by that term?
example_sentence_cn: 你能澄清一下那个术语的意思吗？
inflection: 动词变化: clarifies / clarified / clarifying

example_sentence_en: His actions contradict what he said in the interview.
example_sentence_cn: 他的行为与他在采访中所说的相矛盾。
inflection: 动词变化: contradicts / contradicted / contradicting

example_sentence_en: Use extra reading to supplement your classroom notes.
example_sentence_cn: 用额外的阅读来补充你的课堂笔记。
inflection: 动词变化: supplements / supplemented / supplementing; 复数: supplements

example_sentence_en: In writing tasks, paraphrase the question before answering.
example_sentence_cn: 在写作任务中，回答前先改写题目。
inflection: 动词变化: paraphrases / paraphrased / paraphrasing

example_sentence_en: Please enumerate the key advantages of your proposal.
example_sentence_cn: 请列举你的提案的主要优点。
inflection: 动词变化: enumerates / enumerated / enumerating

example_sentence_en: You must substantiate your claims with evidence.
example_sentence_cn: 你必须用证据证实你的主张。
inflection: 动词变化: substantiates / substantiated / substantiating

example_sentence_en: The industrial revolution had a profound impact on society.
example_sentence_cn: 工业革命对社会产生了深刻的影响。
inflection: 比较级: more profound | 最高级: most profound

example_sentence_en: A coherent argument requires clear structure and evidence.
example_sentence_cn: 连贯的论证需要清晰的结构和证据。
inflection: 复数: coherent arguments

example_sentence_en: The teacher used an analogy to explain the concept.
example_sentence_cn: 老师用类比的方法来解释这个概念。
inflection: 复数: analogies

example_sentence_en: State your thesis clearly at the beginning of your essay.
example_sentence_cn: 在文章开头清楚地陈述你的论点。
inflection: 复数: theses

example_sentence_en: The argument is based on a false premise.
example_sentence_cn: 这个论点建立在一个错误的前提上。
inflection: 复数: premises

example_sentence_en: Her work exemplifies the highest standards of research.
example_sentence_cn: 她的工作体现了最高的研究标准。
inflection: 动词变化: exemplifies / exemplified / exemplifying

example_sentence_en: Understanding the nuances of the language is essential.
example_sentence_cn: 理解语言的细微差别是至关重要的。
inflection: 复数: nuances

example_sentence_en: A rigorous study schedule is needed for exam preparation.
example_sentence_cn: 备考需要一个严格的学习计划。
inflection: 比较级: more rigorous | 最高级: most rigorous

example_sentence_en: Empirical research provides evidence based on observation.
example_sentence_cn: 实证研究提供了基于观察的证据。
inflection: 无

example_sentence_en: She dedicated three months to reviewing for the gaokao.
example_sentence_cn: 她花了三个月专心备战高考。
inflection: 动词变化: dedicates / dedicated / dedicating

example_sentence_en: A tenacious student never gives up despite difficulties.
example_sentence_cn: 坚韧的学生即使面对困难也从不放弃。
inflection: 比较级: more tenacious | 最高级: most tenacious

example_sentence_en: Diligent revision before the exam will lead to better results.
example_sentence_cn: 考前勤奋地复习会带来更好的成绩。
inflection: 比较级: more diligent | 最高级: most diligent

example_sentence_en: You must persevere even when the work gets difficult.
example_sentence_cn: 即使工作变得困难，你也必须坚持。
inflection: 动词变化: perseveres / persevered / persevering

example_sentence_en: Her aspiration to study medicine drives her every day.
example_sentence_cn: 她学医的志向每天都在激励着她。
inflection: 复数: aspirations

example_sentence_en: She endeavored to improve her English every single day.
example_sentence_cn: 她每天都在努力提高自己的英语。
inflection: 动词变化: endeavors / endeavored / endeavoring; 复数: endeavors

example_sentence_en: She excels in mathematics and science.
example_sentence_cn: 她在数学和科学方面非常出色。
inflection: 动词变化: excels / excelled / excelling

example_sentence_en: Hard work enables students to attain high academic results.
example_sentence_cn: 努力使学生能够取得优异的学业成绩。
inflection: 动词变化: attains / attained / attaining

example_sentence_en: We should strive to reach our full potential.
example_sentence_cn: 我们应该努力发挥我们的全部潜力。
inflection: 动词变化: strives / strove / striving

example_sentence_en: Students are often overwhelmed by the amount of revision needed.
example_sentence_cn: 学生们常常被所需的大量复习搞得不知所措。
inflection: 动词变化: overwhelms / overwhelmed / overwhelming

example_sentence_en: Be meticulous when checking your work before submission.
example_sentence_cn: 提交前检查工作时要一丝不苟。
inflection: 比较级: more meticulous | 最高级: most meticulous

example_sentence_en: Every endeavour will be worth it when you succeed.
example_sentence_cn: 当你成功时，每一份努力都是值得的。
inflection: 动词变化: endeavours / endeavoured / endeavouring

example_sentence_en: Optimize your study routine to maximize efficiency.
example_sentence_cn: 优化你的学习方法以最大化效率。
inflection: 动词变化: optimizes / optimized / optimizing

chinese: 优先考虑；按重要性排列
example_sentence_en: Prioritize the most challenging topics in your revision.
example_sentence_cn: 在复习时优先考虑最具挑战性的话题。
inflection: 动词变化: prioritizes / prioritized / prioritizing

example_sentence_en: Effective revision includes active recall and practice tests.
example_sentence_cn: 有效的复习包括主动回忆和练习测试。
inflection: 复数: revisions

example_sentence_en: Active recall is one of the most effective revision techniques.
example_sentence_cn: 主动回忆是最有效的复习技巧之一。
inflection: 动词变化: recalls / recalled / recalling

example_sentence_en: Regular practice improves knowledge retention.
example_sentence_cn: 定期练习提高了知识的记忆力。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: A quiet environment helps improve concentration while studying.
example_sentence_cn: 安静的环境有助于学习时提高专注力。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Perseverance is the most important quality during exam preparation.
example_sentence_cn: 毅力是备考期间最重要的品质。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Reaching the pinnacle of academic success requires years of effort.
example_sentence_cn: 达到学业成就的顶峰需要多年的努力。
inflection: 复数: pinnacles

example_sentence_en: The gaokao is a major milestone in every student's life.
example_sentence_cn: 高考是每个学生人生中的重要里程碑。
inflection: 复数: milestones

example_sentence_en: She hoped to exceed her previous best score.
example_sentence_cn: 她希望超越她之前的最高分数。
inflection: 动词变化: exceeds / exceeded / exceeding

example_sentence_en: Achieving your goals brings a great sense of fulfillment.
example_sentence_cn: 实现目标会带来极大的成就感。
inflection: 不可数名词

example_sentence_en: Making a breakthrough in a difficult subject is very rewarding.
example_sentence_cn: 在一门难科目上取得突破是非常令人满足的。
inflection: 复数: breakthroughs

example_sentence_en: Reflection after each practice exam helps identify weaknesses.
example_sentence_cn: 每次模拟考试后的反思有助于找出薄弱点。
inflection: 复数: reflections

example_sentence_en: Success in exams requires total commitment.
example_sentence_cn: 考试成功需要全身心的投入。
inflection: 复数: commitments

example_sentence_en: Studying for months requires mental endurance.
example_sentence_cn: 数月的备考需要强大的心理耐力。
inflection: 不可数名词

chinese: 有韧性的；能迅速恢复的
example_sentence_en: A resilient student can handle setbacks without losing confidence.
example_sentence_cn: 有韧性的学生能够应对挫折而不失去信心。
inflection: 比较级: more resilient | 最高级: most resilient

example_sentence_en: It is important to acknowledge areas where you need improvement.
example_sentence_cn: 承认你需要改进的地方是很重要的。
inflection: 动词变化: acknowledges / acknowledged / acknowledging

example_sentence_en: Aiming for a high score motivates students to study harder.
example_sentence_cn: 以高分为目标激励学生更加努力学习。
inflection: 动词变化: scores / scored / scoring; 复数: scores

example_sentence_en: Use past exam papers as benchmarks for your preparation.
example_sentence_cn: 用历年考题作为备考的基准。
inflection: 复数: benchmarks

example_sentence_en: Teachers assess students through tests and assignments.
example_sentence_cn: 教师通过测试和作业评估学生。
inflection: 动词变化: assesses / assessed / assessing

example_sentence_en: Developing reading fluency takes consistent daily practice.
example_sentence_cn: 提高阅读流利度需要持续每日练习。
inflection: 不可数名词
